item.title: oliviajulianna still waiting on the answer “progressive organizer” for … what exactly?
item.description:
oliviajulianna still waiting on the answer “progressive organizer” for … what exactly? - and to the general audience, it bears repeating that this is not full proof and I’m not suggesting all anti-capitalists are on the left, but rather the inverse - you are not on the left if you are not anti-capitalist.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It is not in fact amazing that the king has a billion new plots of land
item.description:
It is not in fact amazing that the king has a billion new plots of land. No , I don’t appreciate his serf count doubling.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They really are showing their hand rn, and it’s nasty - Theo not way you can care about the internal representations of that opp...
item.description:
They really are showing their hand rn, and it’s nasty - Theo not way you can care about the internal representations of that oppression, is if u actively ignore its external causes



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Yes this is eugenics
item.description:
Yes this is eugenics. This is weird and it should be rejected in its totality. They don’t care about any scientific basis of it, they care that it promotes thier understanding of masculinity



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: Your passport entitles you to nothing, accepting the case of American passport which may be justifies a little more mistreatment
item.description:
Your passport entitles you to nothing, accepting the case of American passport which may be justifies a little more mistreatment
